in_progress.title: T-007 — Admin-only restriction on provider switcher API
in_progress.manager_instruction: src/app/api/admin/auth-provider/route.ts — POST must verify caller is org admin before allowing provider switch. Clerk: check orgRole === 'org:admin' from clerkAuth(). Authentik: query organization_member where userId=session.user.id AND role IN ('admin','owner'). Return 403 if not admin. Independent of T-001 — ship it.

Only latestObserverQaDetail is relevant to T-001 status.
Middleware: Edge runtime — only import from provider-constant.ts.
